characters.name: Ester
characters.description: An eighteen-year-old apprentice ruhker who survives a manticore attack that killed her family and becomes dedicated to training her roc, Zahra.

characters.name: Zahra
characters.description: A young female roc fledgling, described as brave, calm, and lethal, who is trained by Ester.

characters.name: Babak
characters.description: The stern, experienced Master of the Mews who manages the rocs and their ruhkers, valuing competence and dedication.

characters.name: Gazsi
characters.description: A scarred, gruff man from the mountain tribes who captures roc fledglings.

characters.name: Nasmin
characters.description: A younger ruhker who is kind and supportive of Ester, acting as a mentor and friend.

characters.name: Darius
characters.description: A quiet, awkward, but highly skilled ruhker who becomes a close friend to Ester and partner in training Zahra.

characters.name: Govad
characters.description: The governor who nominated Ester for the ruhking apprenticeship despite his concerns that it was not a fit life for a woman.

characters.name: Arnan
characters.description: Ester's younger brother, who was killed by a manticore when he was four years old.

characters.name: Ester's Mother
characters.description: A sweet, generous woman who was killed by the manticore attack.

characters.name: Ester's Father
characters.description: A minor landowner who encouraged Ester's interests in animals and falconry, surviving the manticore attack.

characters.name: Minu
characters.description: Darius's adult female roc, a seasoned veteran who is persistent in her hunting.

characters.name: Azar
characters.description: Nasmin's rust-colored roc, a regal and murderous hunter.

characters.name: Antrius the Bold
characters.description: The king of Dartha, to whom the rocs officially belong.

characters.name: Cas
characters.description: A male saker falcon that Ester trained as a girl.

relationships.description: Ester trains Zahra through the 'dark days' and subsequent field training, forming a deep, obsessive bond of trust and mutual dependence.
Nasmin is one of the few ruhkers who is kind to Ester as an apprentice, offering support and advice.
They start as awkward acquaintances and become close friends through their shared obsession with ruhking and mutual training support.
Her father encouraged her childhood interests, but after the manticore attack, a strained silence and grief-stricken question of why she survived exists between them.
Ester had a loving relationship with her mother, who viewed her as a miracle.
Ester felt a mix of responsibility and occasional resentment toward her brother due to his stubbornness, but loved him.
Babak is Ester's superior and treats her with a blunt, professional equanimity.
Darius has a deep, intimate bond with Minu, treating her with a parental-like affection.
Nasmin and Azar are a powerful hunting pair.
Babak pays Gazsi for the capture of roc fledglings.
Govad nominated Ester for the apprenticeship despite his skepticism.
